headline: Did GameStop’s (GME) Big Share Boost and eBay Bet Just Redefine Its Strategic Playbook?
summary: GameStop Corp. recently asked stockholders to approve a major amendment to its charter that would raise authorized common shares to 2.50 billion, providing broad flexibility for future capital-raising, acquisitions, and equity compensation, while also increasing its ownership stake in eBay to 7.8% after an earlier approach was rejected. Together, the expanded share authorization request and the larger eBay position highlight GameStop’s willingness to preserve structural flexibility and...
